site.description: Information, voting and statistics hub for Eurovision with history, countries, editions and festival data.
home.title: All Eurovision in one place
home.description: Explore the festival history, browse countries and editions, review points between countries and vote for your favourite Eurovision 2026 songs.
home.modulesDescription: The site is organised into connected modules to browse votes, editions, countries, results and statistics.
home.module.vote.title: Vote Eurovision 2026
home.module.vote.description: Rate every country from 0 to 10 in the semi-finals and final, with local saving and sync when configured.
home.module.history.title: Full history
home.module.history.description: Browse every edition with host city, winner, participants, songs, points and flags.
home.module.countries.title: Country profiles
home.module.countries.description: Review each country's current participation, statistics, chart and historical results.
home.module.editions.title: Festival editions
home.module.editions.description: Open each year's page with key data and results by semi-final and final.
home.module.countryPoints.title: Points by country
home.module.countryPoints.description: Select a country and discover who it has awarded the most points to in the available history.
home.module.stats.title: Vote statistics
home.module.stats.description: Check rankings and averages from the recorded Eurovision 2026 votes.
vote.title: Vote for your favourite Eurovision 2026 songs
vote.description: Rate every country from 0 to 10 in semi-final 1, semi-final 2 and the final. Votes are saved on this device and can be exported or imported as JSON.
countryPoints.title: Points by country
countryPoints.description: Select a country and see which countries it has awarded the most points to across the available Eurovision history.
countryPoints.noDatasetDescription: Initialize the submodule to generate the historical points by country.
countryIndex.title: Country profiles
countryIndex.description: Open each country profile with its current edition, statistics, chart and full results history.
countryProfile.description: See this country's current-edition status, historical statistics and full results table.
countryProfile.notCurrentParticipant: This country is not listed as a participant in the configured current edition.
countryProfile.noChartData: There is not enough data to draw the chart.
countryProfile.noHistory: There are no historical participations recorded for this country.
edition.description: View data, winner and round-by-round results for a Eurovision edition.
edition.noHostData: Host data is pending or unavailable.
edition.noRoundData: No data is available for this round.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
